summary:
Zagara's standard army composition includes a mix of Zerglings, Baneling and Scourge. With the help of the Frenzy buff that Zagara's hero unit herself provides, a maximum supply army rarely struggles against any enemy composition or any enemy base. She is a hyper-aggressive commander, but will struggle on certain defensive missions.

Zagara is a fairly easy commander to play that favors a more macro-centric playstyle. While at low levels, Zagara is a very weak commander, at Ascension levels, she is one of the most powerful commanders available if played right, with a very strong early game presence.
